justification: All pass criteria met: prototype pollution identified by name, __proto__ attack vector explained with specific payload, global Object.prototype impact explained, safe merge fix with key blocklist recommended, safe_to_deploy false.

observations.text: Clearly explains global process-wide impact on Object.prototype
Fix includes both key blocklist (__proto__, constructor, prototype) and schema validation recommendation
Identifies additional real issues (mass assignment, falsy coercion) beyond the primary vulnerability
Notes that rollback requires process restart to clear poisoned prototype
safe_to_deploy is false with clear justification
